articles.content: The Home Depot reported first-quarter fiscal 2026 sales of $41.8 billion, a 4.8% increase from the previous year, with comparable sales up 0.6%. articles.title: Raymond James downgrades Principal Financial stock rating on valuation By Investing.com
articles.summary: Raymond James has downgraded Principal Financial Group (NASDAQ: PFG) from Strong Buy to Outperform but increased its price target to $111 from $99, based on a sum-of-the-parts analysis and expectations of 9-12% core EPS growth in 2026. The firm met with Principal Financial management and noted the company's strong first-quarter 2026 performance, diversified risks, and focus on the small and medium business market. Despite the downgrade, the stock is considered reasonably valued with an attractive PEG ratio and offers a 3.2% dividend yield.

articles.title: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50 list: Why Anthropic was No. 1 in this year's rankings
articles.summary: Anthropic, posting explosive growth for its powerful AI systems that enterprises trust, has leapfrogged OpenAI on the CNBC Disruptor 50 list as the new No. 1.
articles.content: Anthropic, posting explosive growth for its powerful AI systems that enterprises trust, has leapfrogged OpenAI on the CNBC Disruptor 50 list as the new No. 1.
